metadata.name: nortia
metadata.description: Private resolver-backed prediction markets on Solana

errors.name: InvalidProtocolConfiguration
errors.msg: Protocol configuration is invalid

errors.name: InvalidMarketConfiguration
errors.msg: Market configuration is invalid

errors.name: InvalidPhase
errors.msg: Market phase does not allow this instruction

errors.name: MarketLocked
errors.msg: The market is locked

errors.name: TooEarly
errors.msg: The requested transition is too early

errors.name: DeadlineElapsed
errors.msg: The deadline has elapsed

errors.name: CommitteeQuorumNotMet
errors.msg: Committee quorum was not met

errors.name: DuplicateCommitteeSigner
errors.msg: A duplicate committee signer was supplied

errors.name: BatchCountMismatch
errors.msg: Batch counts do not match accepted orders

errors.name: NoOrders
errors.msg: The market has no accepted orders

errors.name: ZeroCommitment
errors.msg: A zero commitment or root is not allowed

errors.name: InvalidWitnessLength
errors.msg: The public witness has an invalid length

errors.name: PublicWitnessMismatch
errors.msg: The public witness does not match the instruction context

errors.name: InvalidProofLength
errors.msg: The proof payload has an invalid length

errors.name: InvalidVerifierProgram
errors.msg: The verifier program is invalid

errors.name: PoseidonHashFailed
errors.msg: Poseidon hashing failed

errors.name: ArithmeticOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: NoWinners
errors.msg: The resolved side has no winning tickets

errors.name: AlreadyRefunded
errors.msg: The order has already been refunded

errors.name: InvalidOrder
errors.msg: The order does not belong to this market or payer

errors.name: InvalidCollateralMint
errors.msg: The collateral mint is invalid

errors.name: InvalidTokenAccount
errors.msg: A token account does not match the required owner or mint

errors.name: InvalidProtocolFee
errors.msg: The protocol fee is invalid

errors.name: InvalidTreasury
errors.msg: The protocol treasury is invalid

errors.name: InsufficientVaultBalance
errors.msg: The vault does not have enough ticket collateral

errors.name: InvalidTxlineProgram
errors.msg: The TxLINE program is invalid

errors.name: InvalidTxlineRoot
errors.msg: The TxLINE daily root account is invalid

errors.name: InvalidScorePayload
errors.msg: The TxLINE score payload is invalid for this market

errors.name: InvalidTxlineReturn
errors.msg: TxLINE did not return a valid boolean

errors.name: InvalidEngineConfiguration
errors.msg: The V2 engine configuration is invalid

errors.name: InvalidLmsrState
errors.msg: The LMSR quote or market state is outside protocol bounds

errors.name: PriceGuardExceeded
errors.msg: The trade price guard was exceeded

errors.name: TradeDeadlineElapsed
errors.msg: The trade deadline has elapsed

errors.name: InvalidPosition
errors.msg: The position is invalid for this owner or market

errors.name: InsufficientPosition
errors.msg: The position does not have enough outcome shares

errors.name: InsolventMarket
errors.msg: The market vault would become undercollateralized

errors.name: InvalidOracleConfiguration
errors.msg: The oracle configuration is invalid for this market

errors.name: ResolverNotEnabled
errors.msg: The configured resolver is not enabled

errors.name: InvalidObservationTime
errors.msg: The resolution evidence is stale, early, or outside the observation window

errors.name: ResolutionReplay
errors.msg: The oracle evidence has already been consumed

errors.name: InvalidOutcome
errors.msg: The market outcome is invalid

errors.name: PositionAlreadySettled
errors.msg: The position was already settled

errors.name: MarketNotReadyForResolution
errors.msg: The market is not ready for resolution

errors.name: InvalidSwitchboardQuote
errors.msg: The Switchboard quote account or payload is invalid

errors.name: InvalidStorkFeed
errors.msg: The Stork feed account or payload is invalid

errors.name: InvalidAssertion
errors.msg: The optimistic assertion or challenge is invalid

errors.name: ChallengeWindowClosed
errors.msg: The optimistic challenge window is closed

errors.name: InvalidDisputeDecision
errors.msg: The optimistic dispute decision is invalid

errors.name: ResolverSecurityCapExceeded
errors.msg: The trade would exceed the resolver security cap

errors.name: NoOptimisticBondPayout
errors.msg: No optimistic bond payout is available for this claimant

errors.name: InvalidMarketMetadata
errors.msg: The published market metadata does not match its immutable hashes
